name: AI 自动化服务收入
query: ("AI automation" OR "n8n" OR "Make.com") ("clients" OR "revenue" OR "MRR" OR "$") ("workflow" OR "agency" OR "case study") -giveaway -airdrop -hiring -jobs

name: AI Agent 产品收入
query: ("AI agent" OR "AI agents") ("I built" OR "I launched" OR "revenue" OR "MRR" OR "$") -giveaway -airdrop -hiring -jobs

name: AI 微型 SaaS
query: ("AI SaaS" OR "micro SaaS") ("MRR" OR "revenue" OR "users" OR "launched" OR "$") -giveaway -airdrop -hiring -jobs

name: AI 模板和 Prompt 产品
query: ("AI templates" OR "AI prompts" OR "prompt pack") ("sold" OR "revenue" OR "customers" OR "$") -giveaway -airdrop -hiring -jobs

name: AI Newsletter 变现
query: ("AI newsletter" OR "newsletter about AI") ("revenue" OR "sponsors" OR "subscribers" OR "MRR" OR "$") -giveaway -airdrop -hiring -jobs

name: AI 电子书和课程
query: ("AI ebook" OR "AI course") ("sold" OR "revenue" OR "students" OR "$") -giveaway -airdrop -hiring -jobs

name: Faceless AI 内容
query: ("faceless" OR "faceless YouTube") ("AI" OR "automation") ("revenue" OR "views" OR "monetized" OR "$") -giveaway -airdrop -hiring -jobs

name: AI SEO 独立站
query: ("AI SEO" OR "programmatic SEO") ("revenue" OR "traffic" OR "AdSense" OR "affiliate" OR "$") -giveaway -airdrop -hiring -jobs

name: AI Chrome 插件
query: ("AI Chrome extension" OR "Chrome extension") ("revenue" OR "users" OR "MRR" OR "sold" OR "$") -giveaway -airdrop -hiring -jobs

name: AI App Store 产品
query: ("AI app" OR "AI mobile app") ("revenue" OR "downloads" OR "MRR" OR "launched" OR "$") -giveaway -airdrop -hiring -jobs

name: 中文 AI 副业复盘
query: ("AI副业" OR "AI赚钱" OR "用AI赚钱") ("复盘" OR "收入" OR "变现" OR "独立站" OR "工具") -抽奖 -空投 -招聘

name: 中文 AI 自动化接单
query: ("AI自动化" OR "n8n" OR "工作流") ("接单" OR "客户" OR "收入" OR "报价" OR "复盘") -抽奖 -空投 -招聘
